name: Jaycees Tennis Court Park
description: Jaycees Tennis Court Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Steeleville, IL. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Lincoln Park - Red Bud
description: Lincoln Park - Red Bud is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Red Bud, IL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
